title: SEO + Core Web Vitals (separate phase, careful testing required)
description: SEPARATE PHASE. Do not mix with feature development. Targets: Lighthouse SEO=100, Performance>=90, LCP<2.5s, CLS<0.1.

deliverables.frontend/composables/useSeo.ts: usePageSeo(opts) — wraps useSeoMeta + useHead canonical. Uses useRuntimeConfig().public.siteUrl
deliverables.frontend/composables/useSchemaOrg.ts: useArticleSchema(post), useProductSchema(product), useBreadcrumbSchema(crumbs) — inject via useHead script[]
deliverables.frontend/server/routes/sitemap.xml.ts: Dynamic sitemap: all active products + published posts, lastmod from updated_at, Cache-Control: public max-age=3600

canonical_rule: For /products: canonical keeps ?category= only, strips ?sort= and ?page=
image_audit: All must have: src(WebP), alt(non-empty), width, height, loading=lazy. Hero only: loading=eager fetchpriority=high. srcset: 480w/800w/1200w
contracts: NO useSeoMeta outside composables — always via usePageSeo()
acceptance_criteria: curl /sitemap.xml -> valid XML with products and posts
Google Rich Results Test — product and article pass Schema.org validation
